privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the synthetic GNU Health 5.0 demo database. Analysis of the SQL dump and setup scripts confirms that patient Ana Isabel Betz exists with PUID GNU777ORG, and health professional Cameron Cordara is present. The HbA1c lab type is explicitly injected. Verifier scripts strictly enforce the HbA1c result to be between 9.0 and 9.8, an ICD-10 condition code starting with E10, an insulin prescription, and an urgent follow-up appointment within 7 to 28 days.
